THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT EISENBERG, IRA EISENBERG, SALLY EISENBERG, GAYE ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $1,252.70 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,252.70, JUDGMNT FOR DEFTS ON COMPLAINT. ON CROSS-COMPLAINT, JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF CROSS-COMPLAINANTS SALLY EISENBERG, IRA EISENBERG & GAYE EISENBERG AND AGAINST PLTFFS IN THE AMOUNT OF $15,000.00 PLUS COSTS PURSUANT TO FILED COST BILL.
